zh.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農

zh.lifeSummary: 當James Wright於1699年12月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，他的父親Samuel Wright25歲，母親Rebeckah Sykes21歲。他於1724年4月23日與Sarah Guild在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1750年9月11日在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Wright于1699年12月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，他的父亲Samuel Wright25岁，母亲Rebeckah Sykes21岁。他于1724年4月23日与Sarah Guild在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1750年9月11日在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Wright was born on 5 December 1699, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Samuel Wright, was 25 and his mother, Rebeckah Sykes, was 21. He married Sarah Guild on 23 April 1724, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 11 September 1750, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Wright est né le 5 décembre 1699, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Wright, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Rebeckah Sykes, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Guild le 23 avril 1724, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 septembre 1750, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Wright am 5. Dezember 1699 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Wright 25 und seine Mutter Rebeckah Sykes 21. Er hat am 23. April 1724 in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Guild geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. September 1750 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Wright è nato il il 5 dicembre 1699 nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Samuel Wright, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Rebeckah Sykes, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Guild il 23 aprile 1724, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 settembre 1750, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Wrightが1699年12月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父Samuel Wrightは25歳，母Rebeckah Sykesは21歳であった。1724年4月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンでSarah Guildと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1750年9月11日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンで50歳で死去した。

ko.Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 레바넌

ko.lifeSummary: James Wright(이)가 1699년 12월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Wright(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebeckah Sykes(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1724년 4월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 Sarah Guild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1750년 9월 11일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Wright nasceu em 5 de dezembro de 1699, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Wright, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Rebeckah Sykes, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Guild em 23 de abril de 1724, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1750, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Wright родился 5 декабря 1699 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Samuel Wright было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebeckah Sykes, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Guild 23 апреля 1724 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 сентября 1750 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Wright nació el 5 de diciembre de 1699, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Samuel Wright, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Rebeckah Sykes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sarah Guild el 23 de abril de 1724, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1750, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 50 años.
